return(function(V,G,J,q,M,D,R,u,T,w,f,S,g,n,F,i,k,b,N,U,x,E,h)S,N,g,f,k,E,F,i,b,x,w,U,u,h,n,T=function(V,y)local G=w(y)local J=function(J,q,M,D)return n(V,{J;q;M,D},y,G)end return J R={i}n=V[y(725168-685028)]end else i=i+h I=not U R=i<=w R=I and R I=i>=w I=U and I R=I or R I=237149+744120 n=R and I R=-360281+5884456 n=n or R end else if n<-952402+17054984 then n=1109005-(-846161)else n=-610081+7268853 end end end end end end end n=#M return G(R)end,function(V,y)local G=w(y)local J=function(J,q,M,D,R,u)return n(V,{J;q;M;D,R,u},y,G)end return J end return(U(25112+13844009,{}))(G(R))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[y(-867420+907676)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
